personal.name: Ankit Kumar Sharma
personal.title: Platform & DevOps Architect
personal.tagline: Platform Architect with 12+ years of expertise across DevOps, Cloud, and Databricks Lakehouse — engineering secure, automated, and high-performance platforms.

summary:
Platform Architect with 12+ years of experience designing and scaling secure, automated, and high-performance cloud and data platforms across AWS, Azure, and Databricks Lakehouse. Expertise in Terraform-based IaC, Kubernetes, and DevOps practices, with a strong focus on building standardized, multi-tenant platforms governed through frameworks like AWS Control Tower and Unity Catalog.

Driven by reliability and efficiency, I integrate observability and SRE principles using CloudWatch, Prometheus, Grafana, and Databricks dashboards to ensure high availability, performance, and cost optimization. Proven track record in leading platform transformations, enabling self-service ecosystems, and delivering resilient architectures with robust backup and disaster recovery strategies..

responsibilities: Designed Kubernetes infrastructure supporting microservices based retail applications.
Built automated CI/CD pipelines enabling rapid and reliable application deployments.
Developed reusable Terraform modules for scalable AWS infrastructure provisioning.
Implemented centralized monitoring platform using Prometheus and Grafana.
Reduced deployment time by 70% through DevOps automation.
Migrated financial application infrastructure to AWS cloud.
Built CI/CD pipelines automating build and deployment workflows.
Implemented monitoring and logging solutions for enterprise applications.
Developed automation scripts using Python and Bash.
Managed Linux infrastructure supporting enterprise workloads.
Implemented monitoring solutions improving operational visibility.
